page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.26xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 104 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 104 physical cores with a single thread per core, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The processing power is driven by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a baseline clock speed of 2.5 GHz.

The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.69 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning storage needs must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g6.26xlarge offers a high density of dedicated physical cores and memory, making it suitable for enterprise-grade workloads that require predictable CPU performance without hyperthreading interference. This hardware profile is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, large-scale web serving, enterprise applications, and database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.26xlarge is a general-purpose instance configured with 104 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this server utilizes an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with an x86_64 architecture operating at 2.5 GHz. The hardware configuration provides a dedicated physical core for each vCPU, with 1.0 thread per core, ensuring consistent compute performance. The instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage options. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for enterprise applications, multi-threaded processing, and general-purpose workloads requiring high core counts and balanced memory allocation.
